name: SyriSign: A Parallel Corpus for Arabic Text to Syrian Arabic Sign Language Translation
summary: arXiv:2603.29219v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Sign language is the primary approach of communication for the Deaf and Hard-of-Hearing (DHH) community. While there are numerous benchmark...
description: arXiv:2603.29219v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Sign language is the primary approach of communication for the Deaf and Hard-of-Hearing (DHH) community. While there are numerous benchmarks for high-resource sign languages, low-resource languages like Arabic remain underrepresented. Currently, there is no publicly available dataset for Syrian Arabic Sign Language (SyArSL). To overcome...
author: Mohammad Amer Khalil, Raghad Nahas, Ahmad Nassar, Khloud Al Jallad
